    R

    RECENTLY_ADDED - Enum constant in enum class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.SortStrategy
     
    RecentlyPlayedController - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Dashboard
    Builds and refreshes the Recently Played panel on the Dashboard.

    recordFailedAttempt(String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LoginAttemptService
    Records a failed login attempt for the given username and applies the 5-second delay.
    recordPlay(Song) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaybackTrackingService
    Time Complexity: O(1).

    Registers a new user account with the given credentials.

    releaseYear - Variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.TopAlbumRowData
     
    reloadSelected(Long) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.controller.PlaylistController
    Re-fetches the selected playlist after a rename, then refreshes.
    removeFavourite(Song) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.FavouriteService
     
    removeFirst() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.DoublyLinkedList
    Removes and returns the first element in the list.
    removeLast() - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.DoublyLinkedList
    Removes and returns the last element in the list.
    removeSongFromPlaylist(Long, Song) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: O(n) where n = songs in playlist (list.remove()) Space Complexity: O(1)
    ReportDisplayController - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics
    Displays weekly/monthly reports.

    resetAttempts(String) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LoginAttemptService
    Resets all failed attempt state for the given username.
    resolveAlbumsForArtist(Artist) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.LibraryService

    rightPanelPrefWidth() - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.AppUtils
    Returns a right-panel preferred width scaled to the screen.
